title: Just orcs
body:
![mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7268cebe8e6ce4762eee4f2112fd15c30fc2f7ff.png)
## Adds orcs and their camps into the base game
 

You can find orcs in plains, deserts and swamps.
Each biome has 3 settlement types - camp, village, town with camp being the smallest one and town being the largest. Every settlement contains atleast 1 chest with various loot.

On death orcs drop orcchop that you can cook, but if you slay an orc using an axe, there's a chance for you to get either orc fat or orc hair. Golden axes have a greater drop chance. Orc fat is used to craft the weird carrot, orc hair can be uncrafted into 2 string. Eating the weird carrot results in some of your status effects leveling up, making them more effective.

Sometimes you may find orc patrols where the second mob is found - the boarc. Boarcs are passive, but will defend themselves if threatened. They drop quite a lot of orc fat, and have a chance of dropping a tusk. Boarc tusk can be used to create a tuskdagger that can pierce through armor.
